title: urginea autumnalis
intro: Urginea autumnalis, also known as autumn squill, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Urginea autumnalis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
